Title: Effect-size only report
Abstract
The pattern is consistent with an intervention benefit.
Methods
Participants (N = 66) were assigned to treatment and control conditions.
Results
The estimated difference was moderate, Cohen's d = 0.44.
Discussion
These findings may be consistent with an intervention effect, but further work is needed.
References
Nguyen, K. (2023). Example source. https://doi.org/10.1000/example.doi
